title: NCRTC Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Various Patwari Posts
description: National Capital Region Transport Corporation (NCRTC) has issued the official notification for 2026. Various vacancies have been allotted for Patwari Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the  10th Pass can use this opportunity and apply for the NCRTC Jobs 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online by the last date of application. If ...
